scripts.build: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=dist/server.cjs && node scripts/validate-production-config.mjs
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:priority0 && npm run test:sync-health && npm run test:outbox-v2 && npm run test:v2-client && npm run test:storage && npm run test:remote-pull
scripts.test:v2-client: tsx --test src/sync/v2/ProtocolAndOperation.test.ts src/sync/v2/ReplayAndConflict.test.ts src/sync/v2/Snapshot.test.ts src/sync/v2/MultiDevice.property.test.ts src/sync/v2/AdvancedWorkflows.test.ts
scripts.test:outbox-v2: tsx --test src/sync/outbox/OutboxStateMachine.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/outbox/PersistentOutboxRepository.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/outbox/legacyOutboxV2.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/outbox/retryScheduling.test.ts
scripts.benchmark:production-scale: npm run benchmark:seed -- --entries 100000 --notes 25000 --outbox 1000 --media 10000 --sync-events 10000 && npm run benchmark:run -- --runs 5
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run test:storage && npm run test:component && npm run test:server && npm run test:supabase && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:accessibility && npm run android:test && npm run android:lint && npm run scan:secrets
scripts.test:storage: tsx --test src/domain/appSettings.test.ts && tsx --test src/domain/backupMerge.test.ts && tsx --test src/domain/privacyLock.test.ts && tsx --test src/domain/richTextSanitizer.test.ts && tsx --test src/domain/security.test.ts && tsx --test src/components/diaryDetailNavigation.test.ts && tsx --test src/mobile/deepLinks.test.ts && tsx --test src/mobile/imageOptimization.test.ts && tsx --test src/mobile/mediaGarbageCollector.test.ts && tsx --test src/platform/storage/webEncryptedKeyValueStore.test.ts && tsx --test src/repositories/localDiaryRepository.test.ts && tsx --test src/repositories/syncingDiaryRepository.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/accountBootstrap.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/accountRecovery.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/ArchiveHydrationService.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/companionKeyPackage.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/companionPairing.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/deviceKeyRotation.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/domainEvents.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/driveSyncObjects.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/e2eeKeyPackage.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/encryptedSyncObject.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/eventReplay.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/eventSyncEngine.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/partitionHydrationPolicy.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/partitionedMigration.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/partitionedRestore.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/supabaseAuth.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/supabaseControlPlane.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/syncMaintenance.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/syncMedia.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/syncSecrets.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/syncSnapshot.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/syncPartitioning.test.ts && tsx --test src/sync/syncTelemetry.test.ts && tsx --test src/utils/backupEncryption.test.ts && tsx --test src/utils/backupSnapshot.test.ts && tsx --test src/utils/googleProfile.test.ts
